title: Systems Administrator
description: Fastly powers the digital experiences of 99% of the top 100 global sites. Our edge computing platform delivers content and compute in milliseconds. You'll maintain systems supporting some of the world's most trafficked websites.
responsibilities: Manage user accounts, access controls, and security policies
Deploy and maintain servers, networks, and IT infrastructure
Monitor system performance and troubleshoot technical issues
Implement backup and disaster recovery procedures
Support hardware procurement and lifecycle management

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years of systems administration or IT infrastructure experience

benefits: Competitive health, dental, and vision coverage
Unlimited PTO and remote work flexibility
Equity options and/or stock purchase plan
